Fortune 500 Power. Small Business Price.

You Didn't Build This Business to Spend Your Days on This.

Every owner we work with says the same thing. They are spending 10 to 15 hours a week on tasks that are repetitive, manual, and completely fixable. Scheduling. Follow-up calls. Chasing time sheets. Reports. Tasks that feel productive but are quietly strangling their growth.

That Time Has a Price Tag. And It Is Bigger Than You Think.

At a conservative $100 per hour of your time, 10 wasted hours a week is $52,000 a year walking out the door. Not in revenue you lost. In your own time you will never get back. Time you should be spending on strategy, on clients, on growth " or frankly, on anything other than paperwork.

Most Businesses Bleed Money in the Same Three Places.

Missed Calls

Every unanswered call is a paying customer calling your competitor instead. Average lost job value: $500 to $2,000 per call.

Manual Everything

Scheduling, follow-ups, and reporting by hand costs you 10 to 15 hours a week. That is $40,000 to $120,000 a year in lost productivity.

Slow Response Time

Studies show the first company to respond wins the deal 78% of the time. If your process is manual, you are always second.

Your Competitor Already Has This System.

Right now, the business down the street that fixed their workflow last year is responding to leads faster, closing more deals, and working fewer hours than you. Every week you wait is another week they pull further ahead. This is not a technology problem. It is a decision problem.

Free Assessment First. You Decide What Happens Next.

1

Book Your Free 5-Minute Assessment

We ask the right questions to map exactly where your business is losing time and dropping leads. No prep needed. No tech knowledge required. Just show up and talk.

2

Receive Your Written Report Within 48 Hours

A professional assessment lands in your inbox showing your top revenue leaks with dollar figures attached. You keep this report whether you work with us or not.

3

You Choose Your Fix

We only recommend a solution if we can prove it pays for itself within 90 days. If we cannot prove the ROI, we do not recommend the fix. Simple as that.

The Number One Problem We Find? Unanswered Calls.

In most assessments for local service businesses, the biggest revenue leak is calls going unanswered while the owner is out working. When that is the diagnosis, the fix is an automated front desk that answers every call on the first ring, qualifies the lead, and books the appointment directly to your calendar " 24 hours a day, 7 days a week.

Built For Owners Who Are Done Leaving Money on the Table.

This is for you if:

  • You are a business owner or CEO who is too busy doing the work to grow the business
  • You are losing leads because you cannot respond fast enough
  • You have staff doing repetitive tasks that should be automated
  • You want straight answers without tech jargon or a sales runaround

This is NOT for you if:

  • You have a full administrative team already handling everything
  • You are not willing to change how your business currently operates
